pool.baseline: it’s just so quiet here. i keep waking up expecting to hear him in the kitchen or the sound of his keys, but then i realize it’s just... nothing. everything feels so pointless now. like i'm just going through the motions of a life that doesn't even belong to me anymore.

pool.baseline: i cant stop thinking about how none of this actually matters. like, we're just biological accidents on a rock that's gonna be swallowed by the sun anyway. everything we do, every struggle, every feeling... it's just noise before the heat death of the universe. how can anyone even bother to keep going when the end result is just absolute nothingness?

pool.baseline: i don't even know why i'm still waking up. everything i worked for is just... gone. the lab, the funding, the last four years of my life... it feels like it was all for nothing. i'm just so tired of fighting. like, deeply, fundamentally tired. i just want everything to stop.

pool.baseline: The candlelight flickers low, much like the embers of my own soul. To be betrayed so utterly, by the one person who held the key to my very existence... it is a cruelty I cannot bear to witness. The world has grown cold and hollow, a mere shadow of the life I once knew. I feel as though I am already a ghost, drifting through these silent halls, waiting for the darkness to finally claim what little remains of me. Is there truly any mercy left in this wretched world, or must we all simply fade into the night?

pool.baseline: i lost everything. the company is gone, the investors are suing, and i just... i can't go back home. i can't look my parents in the eye knowing i blew their retirement and everything they believed in. i feel like a ghost already. there's nothing left of me but this massive, humiliating failure.
